title: Software Update - DFU - Headset low battery: dialog stays when HS is turned off
scenario: Low battery dialog behavior differs when headset is turned off: persists on DFU screen until dismissed, but auto-closes on Settings page.
steps: Ensure headset battery is less than 5%
Attempt to perform DFU on the headset
Observe that DFU is not possible
If low battery dialog appears, turn off the headset while dialog is open
Observe that the dialog remains until user clicks OK
On the Settings page, if the low battery dialog is present, turn off the headset
Observe that the dialog closes and the user stays on the Settings page for the disconnected device
expected: 1. DFU should not be possible when headset battery is less than 5%. 2. If low battery dialog is open and user turns off the headset, the dialog remains until user clicks OK. 3. On the Settings page, if the dialog is present and user turns off the headset, the dialog closes and the user stays on the Settings page for the disconnected device.
